profile.warranty_terms: 12 months limited warranty on manufacturing defects
profile.manufacturing_ethos: Crafted in Italy with a focus on premium materials, ergonomic design, and rigorous safety testing standards.
profile.story: ROOF is an Italian motorcycle helmet manufacturer that has established itself as a premium brand within the European market, known for blending high-end aesthetics with functional safety. Unlike mass-market competitors, ROOF positions itself through exclusive distribution channels and collaborations with top-tier fashion houses, targeting riders who view their gear as an extension of personal style rather than just protective equipment. The brand's identity is deeply rooted in the Italian tradition of artisanal manufacturing, emphasizing hand-finished details and superior shell construction.
